StudentDashboard.loadFailedBody: Your session may have expired. Try signing out and back in.
StudentDashboard.browseToEnroll: Browse the marketplace to enroll in a course.
StudentDashboard.enrollForPlan: Enroll in a course and your daily plan will appear here.
StudentDashboard.skillEmpty: Complete a few lessons and your skill mastery will track here per strand.
StudentDashboard.assignmentsEmpty: No assignments due. Teachers can post weekly work here.

LessonReader.emptyBody: Your teacher hasn't added content to this lesson yet. Check back soon — or pick another lesson from the course outline.
LessonReader.comingSoon: Reader for {type} blocks is on the way. Your teacher has added this to the lesson; the student-side rendering ships next.
LessonReader.readingEmpty: Your teacher hasn't added the reading content yet.
LessonReader.mcqEmpty: Your teacher hasn't finished setting up this question yet.
LessonReader.mcqSignIn: Sign in to save your answer.
LessonReader.mcqError: Couldn't submit your answer. Try again.
LessonReader.mcqOffline: ✓ Saved offline — syncs when you reconnect
LessonReader.slidesEmpty: Your teacher hasn't added a slides URL yet.
LessonReader.pdfEmpty: Your teacher hasn't added a PDF URL yet.
LessonReader.pollEmpty: Your teacher hasn't finished setting up this poll yet.
LessonReader.pollError: Couldn't record your vote. Try again.
LessonReader.pollOffline: ✓ Vote saved offline — syncs when you reconnect
LessonReader.pollVoted: {count, plural, one {# vote} other {# votes}} · click another option to change yours
LessonReader.pollUnvoted: {count, plural, one {# vote} other {# votes}} so far — pick one to see the results
LessonReader.frEmpty: This free-response block isn't configured yet — the teacher needs to add a writing prompt.
LessonReader.frPlaceholder: Write your answer in your own words…
LessonReader.speakEmpty: Your teacher hasn't added a speaking prompt yet.

LessonReader.speakStartFail: Couldn't start recording. Refresh and try again.
LessonReader.speakNoTts: Text-to-speech isn't available in this browser.
LessonReader.speakClose: Close — try again for an exact match.
LessonReader.simEmpty: Your teacher hasn't added a simulation URL yet.
LessonReader.quizEmpty: Your teacher hasn't added any questions to this quiz yet.

Library.title: My Library
Library.inProgress: {count, plural, =0 {Nothing in progress yet} one {# course in progress} other {# courses in progress}}
Library.emptyBody: Enroll in a course from the marketplace and it'll appear here, ready to pick up where you left off.

SkillTree.title: Your skill journey
SkillTree.aiNote: Your next skill advances as you answer questions correctly
SkillTree.upNextHint: ↑ Up next — correct answers move this toward mastery

Browse.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, subject, or teacher…

TeacherCourses.title: My courses
TeacherCourses.emptyBody: Start from a blank canvas and build your units your way — or generate a draft with AI. You're in control either way.

AdminDashboard.masteryEmpty: The per-class mastery heatmap appears here once classes start logging skill-mastery data.
AdminDashboard.complianceEmpty: No compliance checks configured yet. SSO, FERPA flags, parent consent, and content-filter status appear here once your district is wired up.

TeacherEarnings.title: Your creator payouts
TeacherEarnings.payoutsBody: Your earnings are paid out through Stripe Connect — connect or manage your payout account above, and export your annual earnings as CSV anytime.

TeacherStudents.title: Students
TeacherStudents.emptyFiltered: No students match the current filters.
TeacherStudents.emptyNone: No students have enrolled in your courses yet.

TeacherGrading.title: Free-response review
TeacherGrading.intro: Every short answer your students submitted, with the AI's grade. Override any score you disagree with — your grade is final, and the student's XP adjusts to match.
TeacherGrading.emptyBody: When students answer a free-response block in one of your courses, their writing shows up here for review.

TeacherDiscussions.title: Discussions
TeacherDiscussions.intro: Every discussion thread across your courses. Reply as the instructor, or remove any comment that breaks class rules — moderated deletes are recorded in the institution audit log.
TeacherDiscussions.emptyBody: No discussion blocks yet. Add a Discussion block to any lesson in the course builder and student conversations will show up here.
TeacherDiscussions.earlierComments: + {count, plural, one {# earlier comment} other {# earlier comments}}
TeacherDiscussions.postError: Couldn't post your reply. Try again.

AdminTeachers.title: Teachers
AdminTeachers.intro: Hiding a teacher removes their card from the marketplace rail only — their storefront URL and published courses keep working. Payout links bind a teacher to a Razorpay Route linked account (created by you in the Razorpay Dashboard); transfers start once the account is activated.

AdminCurriculum.title: Curriculum
AdminCurriculum.empty: No curricula adopted yet. Browse the marketplace to add one.

AdminBilling.title: Billing
AdminBilling.seatsLine: {seats, plural, one {# seat} other {# seats}} · {active, plural, one {# active student} other {# active students}}
AdminBilling.noInvoices: No invoices yet — your school is on the free trial.

TeacherPaths.title: Multi-course paths
TeacherPaths.intro: Bundle your published courses into an end-to-end path. Bundles show on the marketplace homepage; students enroll in every course with one click.
TeacherPaths.titlePlaceholder: Title — e.g. Grade 6 Math, end to end
TeacherPaths.pickHint: Pick at least 2 courses — click order sets the path order.
TeacherPaths.needTwo: You need at least 2 published courses to make a bundle.
TeacherPaths.created: Bundle created — it's live on the marketplace homepage.

TeacherStorefront.title: Storefront
TeacherStorefront.intro: This is what learners see on your storefront — {name}'s headline, bio, and published courses.
TeacherStorefront.bioPlaceholder: Tell learners about your teaching background and approach.
TeacherStorefront.roadmapBody: Custom storefront URL, brand color, cover photo, pinned courses and referral codes are still planned. Your name, headline, bio, and published courses are live on your storefront now.

AdminAudit.title: Audit log
AdminAudit.totalEvents: {count, plural, one {# total event} other {# total events}} · 7-year retention

LoginPage.heading: Welcome back.
LoginPage.intro: Sign in with your email and password.
LoginPage.errorCredentials: Couldn't sign you in. Check your email and password, or create an account below.
LoginPage.errorForbidden: Your role doesn't have access to that page.
LoginPage.newBody: Explore the course marketplace, see what students learn, and check out our teacher tools. Create a free account to track progress and earn XP.
LoginPage.signinError: Couldn't sign you in. Check your email and password, or sign up below.

SignupPage.heading: Start learning.
SignupPage.intro: Free to sign up — no credit card. Pick Student to learn or Teacher to publish courses.
SignupPage.feat1: Always-available AI tutor that cites the textbook
SignupPage.feat2: Adaptive practice that adjusts to your level
SignupPage.feat3: Daily streak + XP that unlocks new content
SignupPage.feat4: A skill tree that AI re-routes nightly
SignupPage.feat5: 1,200+ free lessons across math, ELA, science
SignupPage.consentUnder13: My parent or guardian has reviewed and agrees to Lyceum's terms of service and privacy policy on my behalf.
SignupPage.consentRegular: I agree to Lyceum's terms of service and privacy policy (with my parent or guardian's consent where required).
SignupPage.errPasswordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
SignupPage.errParent: Under-13 signups need a parent or guardian email.
SignupPage.errConsent: Please accept the terms to continue.

AuthRecovery.fpSent: If an account exists for {email}, a reset link is on its way. It works for 1 hour — check spam if it doesn't arrive.
AuthRecovery.fpIntro: Enter your account email and we'll send a link to choose a new password.
AuthRecovery.rpMissingBody: Open the link from your reset email — it carries the token this page needs.
AuthRecovery.rpDone: Password updated ✓ — sign in with it now.
AuthRecovery.veMissing: Open the link from your verification email.
AuthRecovery.veOk: Email verified ✓ — receipts and account notices will reach you at {email}.
AuthRecovery.pcMissing: Open the link from the consent email.
AuthRecovery.pcOk: Thank you ✓ — you've approved this Lyceum account. Your child can now use it fully.
